description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a black deck with a slightly concave shape and upturned nose and tail. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, visible at the edges, and is topped with a solid black grip tape for traction. Underneath, two metal trucks are mounted, each holding a pair of small, hard wheels, likely made of polyurethane. The wheels are a light gray color and are attached to the trucks with visible axles. The skateboard has a minimalist design with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels. Its compact size and classic shape make it suitable for street and park skating in urban environments.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip-taped deck, light gray wheels, and metal trucks, featuring a minimalist, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, the upturned nose and tail, and both sets of wheels and trucks.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the width of the deck, the black grip tape, and the rounded nose or tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the deck profile and both sets of wheels and trucks.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, showing the width and curvature of the deck.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and hard, light gray, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin, metallic silver color, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern, cut-outs, or graphics
